zh-CN.name: 婶婶
zh-CN.intro: 婶婶是爸爸弟弟的妻子，也是我们的家人。她会做好吃的，喜欢抱抱我们，像妈妈一样温柔。

story.title: 🏠去婶婶家玩
story.body: 星期天，妈妈带我去婶婶家。婶婶住在有花园的房子里，她笑着抱抱我，还做了香香的饼干。我们一起搭积木，婶婶搭了一座高高的城堡。她给我讲故事，说小熊去森林采蜜。我听得咯咯笑。要回家了，婶婶送我一朵自己种的小花。我觉得婶婶真好，像妈妈一样亲。我下次还要来玩！

knowledge.title: 婶婶是谁？
knowledge.body: 婶婶是爸爸弟弟的妻子。在大家庭里，婶婶是我们的长辈，会关心我们、陪我们玩。过年的时候，婶婶还会给小朋友压岁钱，祝福我们快快长大。

en.name: Aunt
en.intro: An aunt is your father's brother's wife. She is part of your family and loves to give you hugs and tasty treats.

story.title: 🏠 Visiting My Aunt
story.body: On Sunday, my mom took me to visit my aunt. She lives in a house with a little garden. She gave me a warm hug and some yummy cookies. We played with building blocks, and she built a tall tower. Then she told me a funny story about a little bear who went to the forest for honey. I laughed and laughed. When it was time to go home, my aunt gave me a flower from her garden. I love my aunt—she is just like a second mom. I can't wait to visit her again!

knowledge.title: Who is an aunt?
knowledge.body: An aunt is your father's younger brother's wife. In a big family, an aunt is a kind elder who takes care of you and plays with you. During Chinese New Year, she may give you lucky money and wish you a happy year.
